identity_and_concept.emotional_tone: Authoritative, vigilant, secure, and professional. It must feel like military-grade software used to protect high-value assets across dangerous borders. No playful elements, no soft gradients. Pure, unadulterated function.
key_principles: Data over Decoration: Color is used strictly for status and alerts. 95% of the UI is monochrome.
Density with Clarity: The Bento Grid must utilize every pixel efficiently. Optical alignment over mathematical alignment.
Gestión por Excepción: The interface is calm (dark/grey) until an anomaly occurs, at which point it violently demands attention (Signal Red).

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Command Center Adaptation)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The application is a mission-critical fleet monitoring dashboard used mostly at night or in dark control rooms. High contrast is required for immediate incident recognition.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist meets Military Telemetry. High contrast between imposing headings and precise data.

headings.usage: Marketing page heroes, dashboard main titles, critical alert banners. NOT Inter.

body.usage: General UI text, descriptions, standard data.

telemetry.usage: Coordinates, speed, timers, unit IDs, timestamps.

rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
Map expands dramatically when a 'Critical Alert' is triggered.

surface_styles.dashboard_cards: Flat solid #121212 background, 1px border-white/10, NO soft shadows. border-radius: 4px (rounded-sm) or 8px max (rounded-md).
surface_styles.marketing_hero: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) over intense highway/truck imagery.
surface_styles.headers: Crystal Glass style (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl) with 1px border-b border-white/10.

marketing_page.structure: Raw HTML + Tailwind. Aggressive layouts, large typography.
marketing_page.commerce: Pricing plans use grid, hover states with 1px border glow. Checkout via WhatsApp/Email links.

dashboard.base: Shadcn UI heavily customized for the 'Tactical' look (sharp edges, monochrome base).
dashboard.map: Leaflet + OpenStreetMap. Map tiles MUST use a dark/night variant filter via CSS (e.g., filter: invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(95%) contrast(90%)).
dashboard.buttons: Square or slight rounding. Hover states must change text color if background changes. Solid white for primary, solid red for panic.
dashboard.chat: Multi-user reactive help desk. Alerts stick to the top.

motion_and_interactions.alerts: Critical alerts MUST pulse (opacity or subtle border glow). Use CSS keyframes for a tactical radar-like pulse on map markers.

iconography.style: Bold or Regular weight for high legibility on dark backgrounds.

requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

hero_background.description: Large cargo truck traveling at night, used for marketing landing page hero background with a heavy black overlay.

highway_context.description: Brightly lit trucks in an urban area at night.

control_room_texture.description: Close-up of an illuminated vintage control panel, to be used as a subtle texture or visual for the 'About' or 'Technology' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React, Tailwind, and Shadcn. Install @phosphor-icons/react, leaflet, react-leaflet.
2. Setup routing: Landing/Commerce page (/) and Dashboard (/dashboard).
3. Apply Dark Mode globally by default. Set body background to #050505 and text to #FFFFFF.
4. Implement the Leaflet map with a CSS filter to force a dark mode appearance if dark tiles are not natively provided.
5. Build the Bento Grid dashboard using CSS Grid (grid-cols-12). Ensure the map component can span wider when an alert state is active in the state management.
6. Build the Help Desk chat and Fleet List with strict adherence to the tactical/monochrome aesthetic. Use IBM Plex Mono for all coordinates and speed values.
7. Ensure the Commercial Plans (Bronce, Plata, Oro) have distinct visual hierarchy, utilizing 1px borders and hover glows.
8. Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, inputs, and interactive cards.
